ModMetadata.Name: Deep Miner Logger
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description: Diagnostic mod. Writes a CSV row to BepInEx/DeepMinerLogger/logs/ on every atmospheric tick where any tracked Combustion Deep Miner state changes. Temporary. Not for Workshop.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v0.1.1: Fixed chamber gas-ratio reads (use GasMixture.GetGasTypeRatio method) and CombustionEnergy read (it is a field, not a property). Dropped rVolatiles column. v0.1.0: Initial build.
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: <size=30><color=#ffa500>Deep Miner Logger</color></size> <line-height=40%>Diagnostic telemetry for Combustion Deep Miner. Writes CSV rows to BepInEx/DeepMinerLogger/logs/ whenever state changes. </line-height>
